title: Get all BOOK-has-video Relationships
user_story:
As an API consumer
I want to be able to fetch all VIDEOS that are connected to a BOOK
So I can find out more about it - be it in form of a review, a promo video or a podcast
description:
* A list of all ›has-video‹ relationships for the selected BOOK is returned when there exists at least one of them. -> Status Code \`200\`
* Each item in the list contains the ID of the created relationship, the relationship name and the relationship partner.
* An empty list is returned when no ›has-video‹ relationship exists. -> Status Code \`200\`
* Requests with invalid ID are rejected. This can happen when there exists no node with the given ID or it is not a BOOK. -> Status Code \`404\`
